case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCITES, LLC VS. TIMOTHY STEFFEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (585) (TRANSACTION ID # 100110388) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCITES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCITES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STEFFEN, TIMOTHY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-17-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100110388) AS TO DEFENDANT STEFFEN, TIMOTHY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCITES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200001347), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCITES, LLC SERVED OCT-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEFFEN, TIMOTHY
DECLARATION REGARDING INTEREST COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100110388) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCITES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCITES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEFFEN, TIMOTHY $4,746.13 PRINCIPAL, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,992.13, SEE SCANNED DOC
